query:
-- Check if user exists
SELECT id, email, role FROM users WHERE email = 'planetsun1@me.com';

-- Create or update user with hashed password for '15181518'
INSERT INTO users (openId, email, passwordHash, role, name, created_at)
VALUES (
  CONCAT('manual_', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()),
  'planetsun1@me.com',
  '$2a$10$vN7xKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxuOZqHxKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqK',
  'SUPER_ADMIN',
  'Admin Planet Sun',
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  passwordHash = '$2a$10$vN7xKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxuOZqHxKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqKxqXqK',
  role = 'SUPER_ADMIN';
